Husband is having a travelling .job
IrMoon is posited in S'h or 9th or in 2nd to Mars or if Moon

FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY 45
Husband is an idiot
If Mars is combined with Mercury, Jupiter and Rahu or if
Rahu is,posited along with debilitated Mars, the husband will have
an idiotic character.
Husband is having lying, cheating and thieving character;
In a female chart if there is a combination of Saturn +
Moon + Rahu + Mars exists the husband will have the
character of cheating, thieving character.
Often the husband will leave his wife:
In a female chart, if there is a combination of Mars+M oon
+Ketu or if there is a combination of waning Moon (_6,m 13og)
+Mars+ Ketu then husband will his wife often and will have
perturbed I disturbed life.
Husband is having an ordinary Job
